name: Compakt
description: Chunked context compaction plugin for local LLMs.
author: gillian groks

enabled.title: Enable Compakt
enabled.description: Enable or disable the Compakt plugin.

summaryModel.title: Summary Model
summaryModel.description: Model used for summarization (e.g., 'ollama/qwen3.5-compaction'). Must match a model available in your Ollama instance.

summaryMaxTokens.title: Summary Max Tokens
summaryMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for the summarizer output.

charsPerToken.title: Characters per Token
charsPerToken.description: Approximate characters per token for estimation. Use 4 for English, 2-3 for code-heavy content.

chunkContextWindow.title: Chunk Context Window
chunkContextWindow.description: Context window size (tokens) for the summarization model. MUST match or be less than your model's num_ctx. Common values: 8192, 16384, 32768.

chunkOverlap.title: Chunk Overlap
chunkOverlap.description: Number of overlapping tokens between chunks for context continuity.
